reason: Adding Settings.theme is a cross-layer contract change — settings.rs serde ↔ TS Settings ↔ normalize in lockstep.
Theme moves from overlay-scoped .theme-dark to a global .dark; overlay dark-glass follows the app theme. Update the dark-mode rule.
New useApplyTheme hook under the coverage gate; test classList toggling (light/dark/system) + matchMedia listener cleanup.
theme union + useApplyTheme typed; no any.
